question: Based on the smartphone market share chart, which of the following statements is accurate?

options.A: Others has the highest market share among all categories.
options.B: Brand A has the highest market share among all categories.
options.C: Brand B has a larger market share than Others.
options.D: Brand D has a larger market share than Brand A.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Others: 40%; Brand A: 30%; Brand D: 20%; Brand B: 10%.
